# Tetragon configuration exploration (2026-02-27 08:38Z)

_**User**_

Explore the Tetragon configuration in this project. I need to understand:

            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "description = \"Stream Tetragon security events from coder namespace\"",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "run = \"kubectl logs -n kube-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tetragon -c export-stdout -f\"",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "[tasks.image-build]",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "description = \"Build the Podman workspace image and import into k3s\"",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "run = \"\"\"",

          },
          {
            "text": "docker build -t coder-podman:latest templates/podman-workspace/build/",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "docker save coder-podman:latest | sudo k3s ctr images import -",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "echo \"Image imported into k3s containerd\"",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "sudo k3s crictl images | grep coder-podman",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "[tasks.template-push]",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "tetragon:",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "  enableProcessCred: true",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "  enableProcessNs: true",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  exportAllowList: '{\"event_set\":[\"PROCESS_EXEC\",\"PROCESS_EXIT\",\"PROCESS_KPROBE\"]}'",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2684
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2744
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **cilium-envoy** â L7 proxy for HTTP-aware network policies",
            "lineNumber": 2685
          },
          {
            "text": "- **hubble-relay + hubble-ui** â network observability dashboard (see all traffic flows between pods)",
            "lineNumber": 2686
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2687
          },
          {
            "text": "### Layer 3: Tetragon (Runtime Security)",
            "lineNumber": 2688
          },
          {
            "text": "- **tetragon** DaemonSet â eBPF-based runtime security engine, monitors all syscalls at kernel level",
            "lineNumber": 2689
          },
          {
            "text": "- **tetragon-operator** â manages TracingPolicy CRDs",
            "lineNumber": 2690
          },
          {
            "text": "- **3 TracingPolicies** scoped to the &#96;coder&#96; namespace:",
            "lineNumber": 2691
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;workspace-exec-monitor&#96; â logs every process execution (execve) in Coder workspaces",
            "lineNumber": 2692
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;workspace-network-monitor&#96; â logs every TCP connect/close in Coder workspaces",
            "lineNumber": 2693
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;workspace-sensitive-access&#96; â logs access to sensitive files (/etc/shadow, K8s secrets, rancher config)",
            "lineNumber": 2694
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2695
          },
          {
            "text": "### Layer 4: Coder (Dev Workspaces)",
            "lineNumber": 2696
          },
          {
            "text": "- **coder** â the workspace platform, exposed on **NodePort 30080**",
            "lineNumber": 2697
          },
          {
            "text": "- **coder-db-postgresql** â dedicated PostgreSQL 18 for Coder persistence",
            "lineNumber": 2698
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2699
          },
          {
            "text": "## How to explore",
            "lineNumber": 2700
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2701
          },
          {
            "text": "**Coder UI** â open in your browser:",
            "lineNumber": 2702
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2703
          },
          {
            "text": "http://localhost:30080",
            "lineNumber": 2704
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2705
          },
          {
            "text": "Create your first admin account there.",
            "lineNumber": 2706
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2707
          },
          {
            "text": "**k9s** â terminal UI for your cluster:",
            "lineNumber": 2708
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2709
          },
          {
            "text": "k9s",
            "lineNumber": 2710
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2711
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2712
          },
          {
            "text": "**Hubble UI** â visualize network flows (port-forward to access):",
            "lineNumber": 2713
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2714
          },
          {
            "text": "kubectl port-forward -n kube-system svc/hubble-ui 12000:80",
            "lineNumber": 2715
          },
          {
            "text": "# then open http://localhost:12000",
            "lineNumber": 2716
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2717
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2718
          },
          {
            "text": "**Tetragon security events** â watch AI agent activity in real-time:",
            "lineNumber": 2719
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2720
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run tetragon-logs",
            "lineNumber": 2721
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2722
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2723
          },
          {
            "text": "**Quick cluster health**:",
            "lineNumber": 2724
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2725
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run status",
            "lineNumber": 2726
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2727
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2728
          },
          {
            "text": "Everything is managed as code in your Ansible playbook. If you ever need to rebuild, &#96;mise run reset&#96; tears it all down and &#96;mise run deploy&#96; brings it back up identically.",
            "lineNumber": 2729
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2730
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2731
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2732
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 2733
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2734
          },
          {
            "text": "il me faut maintenant probablement un premier template coder qui me permette de faire du podman",
            "lineNumber": 2735
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2736
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2737
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2738
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 2739
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2740
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2741
          },
          {
            "text": "The user wants a Coder template that allows them to use Podman for container-in-container workflows in their Coder workspaces. This is for their agentic AI dev environments.",
            "lineNumber": 2742
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2743
          },
          {
            "text": "Coder templates are Terraform files. I need to create a Coder template that:",
            "lineNumber": 2744
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30707040429115295
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./playbooks/reset.yml",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 61
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Tear down the entire stack",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "  hosts: localhost",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  become: false",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  gather_facts: false",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  environment:",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "    KUBECONFIG: \"{{ kubeconfig_path }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  tasks:",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove Coder",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall coder -n {{ coder_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove PostgreSQL",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall coder-db -n {{ coder_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove TracingPolicies",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: \"kubectl delete -f /tmp/{{ item }} --ignore-not-found\"",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "      loop:",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        - policy-exec-monitor.yml",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "        - policy-network-monitor.yml",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "        - policy-sensitive-access.yml",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove Tetragon",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall tetragon -n kube-system",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove Cilium",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall cilium -n kube-system",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Delete Coder namespace",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: kubectl delete namespace {{ coder_namespace }} --ignore-not-found",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Uninstall K3s",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  hosts: localhost",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  become: true",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  gather_facts: false",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  tasks:",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Check if k3s-uninstall script exists",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.stat:",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        path: /usr/local/bin/k3s-uninstall.sh",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      register: _k3s_uninstall",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Run k3s uninstall script",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      when: _k3s_uninstall.stat.exists",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: /usr/local/bin/k3s-uninstall.sh",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove kubeconfig",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.file:",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "        path: \"{{ kubeconfig_path }}\"",

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 55
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 83
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### Key challenges and trade-offs",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Podman-in-Pod tension with security** â Running Podman inside Coder workspaces requires either privileged pods or user namespace mapping. This directly conflicts with the \"secure everything\" goal of Cilium/Tetragon. You'll need to carefully configure:",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "   - &#96;securityContext&#96; with user namespaces (Kubernetes 1.28+ feature)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Or use Podman's rootless mode with &#96;/etc/subuid&#96; and &#96;/etc/subgid&#96; mappings",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Tetragon can then act as the safety net, monitoring what happens inside those semi-privileged pods",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **WSL2 single-node limitations** â This is a dev/personal setup, not HA. That's fine, but be aware:",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "   - K3s must be started with &#96;--flannel-backend=none --disable-network-policy --disable-kube-proxy&#96; for Cilium to take over",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "   - Memory pressure is real â Cilium (~512MB), Tetragon (~256MB), Coder controller (~512MB), plus each workspace pod. Budget at least **8GB RAM** for WSL2.",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "   - &#96;systemd&#96; must be enabled in WSL2 (needed for k3s service management)",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Cilium kube-proxy replacement** â On a single-node setup, I'd recommend letting Cilium fully replace kube-proxy (&#96;--disable-kube-proxy&#96; on k3s). Simpler stack, better performance.",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "### Recommended installation order",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **K3s** â Install with Flannel/kube-proxy/network-policy disabled",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Cilium CLI** â Install Cilium as CNI (the cluster won't be \"Ready\" until this is done)",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Tetragon** â Deploy via Helm, configure TracingPolicies for your security baseline",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Coder** â Deploy via Helm, configure Kubernetes provisioner with Podman-enabled templates",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **TracingPolicies** â Write specific Tetragon policies for Coder workspace pods",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "### My recommendation",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "Go for it â the architecture is sound. The main complexity is getting Podman-in-pod working securely, but Tetragon gives you the observability to catch anything that goes wrong. For agentic AI specifically, I'd suggest starting with **restrictive Tetragon policies** (allowlist approach) and relaxing as needed, rather than starting open and trying to lock down later.",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "Want me to proceed with the implementation? I can set up k3s with Cilium/Tetragon step by step, starting with verifying your WSL2 prerequisites (systemd, cgroups v2, memory allocation).",
            "lineNumber": 83
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2716318964958191
    },

[cilium/ tetragon&lt;br/&gt; &lt;br/&gt; &lt;br/&gt;v1.4.0&lt;br/&gt; &lt;br/&gt; on  GitHub](https://newreleases.io/project/github/cilium/tetragon/release/v1.4.0)&lt;br/&gt;2. [Deploy on Kubernetes \\| Tetragon - eBPF-based Security Observability and Runtime Enforcement](https://tetragon.io/docs/installation/kubernetes)&lt;br/&gt;&lt;br/&gt;# Tetragon Latest Stable Release and Helm Chart&lt;br/&gt;&lt;br/&gt;**Latest Stable Release:** Tetragon v1.4.0 is the latest stable release, with v1.5.0-pre.0 available as a pre-release.[1][3]&lt;br/&gt;&lt;br/&gt;**Helm Chart Installation:** The Tetragon Helm chart is distributed from the Cilium repository at helm.cilium.io. To deploy, use:[2][5]&lt;br/&gt;&lt;br/&gt;&#96;&#96;&#96;&lt;br/&gt;helm repo add cilium https://helm.cilium.io&lt;br/&gt;helm repo update&lt;br/&gt;helm install tetragon cilium/tetragon -n kube-system&lt;br/&gt;&#96;&#96;&#96;&lt;br/&gt;&lt;br/&gt;**Key v1.4.0 Features &amp; Changes:**[1]&lt;br/&gt;- Support for running multiple Tetragon operator replicas with failover lease&lt;br/&gt;- New &#96;rollingUpdate&#96; strategy for operators to reduce upgrade downtime&lt;br/&gt;- Pod anti-affinity preference for better pod distribution&lt;br/&gt;- Inclusion of ancestors in process events&lt;br/&gt;- Attribute resolution capabilities&lt;br/&gt;- Monitoring mode support in tracing policies&lt;br/&gt;- Windows build support (Part -1)&lt;br/&gt;- 298 commits with 110 PRs in this release&lt;br/&gt;&lt;br/&gt;**Helm Chart Source:** The chart is available at github.io/cilium/tetragon/install/kubernetes/tetragon and includes comprehensive configuration values for customization.[2] |",
            "lineNumber": 584

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./roles/k3s/tasks/main.yml",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Check if k3s is already installed",

          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: k3s --version",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _k3s_installed",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",

          },
          {
            "text": "  failed_when: false",

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Set installed k3s version fact",

          },
          {
            "text": "  when: _k3s_installed.rc == 0",

          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.set_fact:",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "    _k3s_current_version: \"{{ _k3s_installed.stdout_lines[0].split(' ')[2] }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Download and install k3s",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  when: _k3s_installed.rc != 0 or (_k3s_current_version is defined and _k3s_current_version is version(k3s_version, '&lt;'))",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  block:",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Download k3s install script",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.get_url:",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "        url: https://get.k3s.io/",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "        dest: /usr/local/bin/k3s-install.sh",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "        mode: \"0755\"",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        timeout: 120",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Run k3s installer",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: /usr/local/bin/k3s-install.sh",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      environment:",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "        INSTALL_K3S_VERSION: \"{{ k3s_version }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "        INSTALL_K3S_EXEC: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "          server",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "          --flannel-backend=none",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "          --disable-network-policy",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "          --disable-kube-proxy",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "          {% for component in k3s_disable_components %}",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "          --disable={{ component }}",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "          {% endfor %}",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "          --write-kubeconfig-mode=644",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "          --cluster-cidr={{ cluster_cidr }}",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "          --service-cidr={{ service_cidr }}",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "          --tls-san={{ api_host }}",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Ensure k3s service is started and enabled",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.systemd:",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    name: k3s",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    state: started",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "    enabled: true",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    daemon_reload: true",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Wait for k3s API server to be reachable",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.wait_for:",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    host: \"{{ api_host }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    port: \"{{ api_port }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    timeout: 120",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Create .kube directory for target user",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.file:",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    path: \"{{ target_home }}/.kube\"",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    state: directory",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    owner: \"{{ target_user }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "    group: \"{{ target_user }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    mode: \"0755\"",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Copy kubeconfig for target user",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.copy:",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    src: /etc/rancher/k3s/k3s.yaml",
            "lineNumber": 64
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.26837146282196045
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 1006
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1057
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **Tetragon**: 3 TracingPolicies scoped to the &#96;coder&#96; namespace that monitor process execution, network connections, and sensitive file access â exactly what you need for agentic AI oversight",
            "lineNumber": 1007
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Coder**: NodePort on &#96;30080&#96;, Bitnami PostgreSQL for persistence, accessible at &#96;http://localhost:30080&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 1008
          },
          {
            "text": "- **All versions pinned** in &#96;group_vars/all.yml&#96; and overridable",
            "lineNumber": 1009
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1010
          },
          {
            "text": "## How to run",
            "lineNumber": 1011
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1012
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 1013
          },
          {
            "text": "# 1. Install Ansible collections",
            "lineNumber": 1014
          },
          {
            "text": "ansible-galaxy collection install -r requirements.yml",
            "lineNumber": 1015
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1016
          },
          {
            "text": "# 2. Deploy everything",
            "lineNumber": 1017
          },
          {
            "text": "ansible-playbook playbooks/site.yml --ask-become-pass",
            "lineNumber": 1018
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1019
          },
          {
            "text": "# 3. To tear down",
            "lineNumber": 1020
          },
          {
            "text": "ansible-playbook playbooks/reset.yml --ask-become-pass",
            "lineNumber": 1021
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 1022
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1023
          },
          {
            "text": "After deployment, visit &#96;http://localhost:30080&#96; to create your Coder admin account. For Podman workspaces, you'll create a Coder Kubernetes template with &#96;securityContext.privileged: true&#96; â Tetragon will still observe everything at the kernel level even inside privileged pods.",
            "lineNumber": 1024
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1025
          },
          {
            "text": "Want me to run it, or would you like to adjust any of the configuration first (versions, ports, TracingPolicies, etc.)?",
            "lineNumber": 1026
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1027
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1028
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1029
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 1030
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1031
          },
          {
            "text": "can you use https://github.com/jdx/mise  as a dev package manager? ",
            "lineNumber": 1032
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1033
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1034
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1035
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 1036
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1037
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 1038
          },
          {
            "text": "The user wants me to use mise as a dev package manager for this project. Mise can manage tools like ansible, helm, kubectl, etc. Let me set up a &#96;mise.toml&#96; file for this project that defines all the tools needed to run the playbook.",
            "lineNumber": 1039
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1040
          },
          {
            "text": "Let me first check what the user has in their &#96;.cursor/mcp.json&#96; since they have it open, and then set up mise.",
            "lineNumber": 1041
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1042
          },
          {
            "text": "Let me think about what tools this project needs:",
            "lineNumber": 1043
          },
          {
            "text": "1. ansible (ansible-core)",
            "lineNumber": 1044
          },
          {
            "text": "2. helm",
            "lineNumber": 1045
          },
          {
            "text": "3. kubectl",
            "lineNumber": 1046
          },
          {
            "text": "4. cilium-cli (optional, for debugging)",
            "lineNumber": 1047
          },
          {
            "text": "5. python (for ansible)",
            "lineNumber": 1048
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1049
          },
          {
            "text": "Mise can install these tools. Let me check what's available in mise's registry for these tools.",
            "lineNumber": 1050
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1051
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1052
          },
          {
            "text": "Now I'll create the &#96;mise.toml&#96; configuration file with all the necessary tools, and I should verify whether mise is already installed on the system first.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 1053
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1054
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1055
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1056
          },
          {
            "text": "Good idea â mise is perfect for pinning the dev tools this project needs. Let me set it up.",
            "lineNumber": 1057
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.26461589336395264
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./templates/podman-workspace/main.tf",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

            "line": 95
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "terraform {",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "  required_providers {",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "    coder = {",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "      source = \"coder/coder\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "    kubernetes = {",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "      source = \"hashicorp/kubernetes\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "provider \"coder\" {}",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "provider \"kubernetes\" {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  config_path = null",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "data \"coder_workspace\" \"me\" {}",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "data \"coder_workspace_owner\" \"me\" {}",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "variable \"namespace\" {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  type    = string",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  default = \"coder\"",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "variable \"cpu_limit\" {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  type    = string",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  default = \"2\"",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "variable \"memory_limit\" {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  type    = string",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "  default = \"4Gi\"",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "variable \"disk_size\" {",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  type    = string",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "  default = \"10Gi\"",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "locals {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  username = data.coder_workspace_owner.me.name",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  home_dir = \"/home/${local.username}\"",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  pvc_name = \"coder-${lower(data.coder_workspace_owner.me.name)}-${lower(data.coder_workspace.me.name)}\"",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "resource \"coder_agent\" \"main\" {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "  os   = \"linux\"",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  arch = \"amd64\"",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  dir  = local.home_dir",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  display_apps {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    vscode          = true",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    web_terminal    = true",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    vscode_insiders = false",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "  env = {",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "    GIT_AUTHOR_NAME     = data.coder_workspace_owner.me.full_name",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    GIT_COMMITTER_NAME  = data.coder_workspace_owner.me.full_name",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "    GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL    = data.coder_workspace_owner.me.email",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL = data.coder_workspace_owner.me.email",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "  metadata {",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    display_name = \"CPU Usage\"",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "    key          = \"0_cpu_usage\"",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    script       = \"coder stat cpu\"",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    interval     = 10",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    timeout      = 1",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  metadata {",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    display_name = \"RAM Usage\"",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    key          = \"1_ram_usage\"",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    script       = \"coder stat mem\"",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    interval     = 10",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    timeout      = 1",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "  startup_script = &lt;&lt;-EOF",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    #!/bin/bash",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    set -e",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "    python --version",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    podman --version",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    echo \"Podman storage driver: $(podman info --format '{{.Store.GraphDriverName}}')\"",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    podman pull docker.io/library/alpine:latest || true",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "  EOF",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "resource \"kubernetes_persistent_volume_claim_v1\" \"workspace\" {",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "  metadata {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    name      = local.pvc_name",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    namespace = var.namespace",
            "lineNumber": 95
          }
        ]
      },

          },
          {
            "text": "All 22 files are created. Here's the full structure and how it works:",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 965
          },
          {
            "text": "## Project structure",
            "lineNumber": 966
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 967
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 968
          },
          {

          },

            "text": "âââ ansible.cfg                          # Ansible config (inventory, roles path, fact caching)",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "âââ inventory.yml                        # Localhost with local connection",

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 474
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 488
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "Let me start building out the actual configuration files and tasks now. I need to look up the latest versions for k3s, Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder, plus specific Cilium Helm configuration for k3s with kube-proxy replacement. Let me also figure out whether to use the &#96;kubernetes.core.helm&#96; Ansible module or shell commandsâthe module is cleaner for idempotency but requires extra dependencies, so I'll go with shell commands wrapped properly for reliability and easier debugging. I'll start writing the files systematically, looking up specific configs as I go. For the Kubernetes components running without root, I need to ensure the kubeconfig has proper permissions after k3s installation so Helm can access it as a regular user. I'll also set up the Helm repositories for Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder, then configure each component with sensible defaultsâCoder will use a built-in PostgreSQL and NodePort service for local access on WSL2, while Tetragon gets TracingPolicy manifests for process execution, network connections, and sensitive file monitoring. Let me start writing out all the files now.",
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "text": "Setting up configuration files...",
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "I need to finalize the versions and think through the Tetragon TracingPolicies for monitoring workspace activity. For process execution, network connections, and sensitive file access, I'll use kprobes targeting the coder namespace. The Coder workspace template will need to support Podman-in-pod, either through privileged containers or a rootless setup with proper capabilities, and I can register it with Coder after the initial deployment.",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "text": "Now I'm mapping out all the files I need to create: the Ansible configuration, requirements, inventory, group variables, main playbook, and then five roles (prereq, k3s, cilium, tetragon, coder) with their tasks, defaults, handlers, and policy files. I'll use &#96;lookup('env', 'HOME')&#96; in group_vars to handle the kubeconfig path consistently across plays with different privilege levels.",
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "Generating Ansible configuration files... I'm realizing that &#96;ansible_env&#96; reflects the become_user's environment when &#96;become: true&#96; is set, so I need to be careful about how I reference paths. The safest approach is to define the target user and home directory as variables in group_vars using &#96;lookup('env', ...)&#96;, which always reads from the controller's environment rather than the remote or become user. Now I'll write out all the configuration files, starting with the prereq role tasks.",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "Writing prereq tasks...",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "Writing k3s role configuration... I'm setting up the Cilium installation tasksâfirst checking if it's already deployed, then installing it with the appropriate Helm values if needed, or upgrading it if the version has changed.",
            "lineNumber": 488
          }
        ]
      },

          {
            "text": "---",

          {
            "text": "- name: Add Cilium Helm repository",

          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: helm repo add cilium https://helm.cilium.io/",

          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _cilium_repo",

          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: \"'has been added' in _cilium_repo.stdout\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  failed_when: _cilium_repo.rc != 0 and 'already exists' not in _cilium_repo.stderr",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Update Cilium Helm repository",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: helm repo update cilium",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Template Cilium Helm values",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.template:",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    src: values.yml.j2",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    dest: /tmp/cilium-values.yml",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    mode: \"0644\"",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Install or upgrade Cilium",

          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: &gt;-",

          },
          {
            "text": "    helm upgrade --install cilium cilium/cilium",

          },

            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    --namespace kube-system",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    -f /tmp/cilium-values.yml",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    --wait --timeout 10m",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _cilium_install",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 467
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 480
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "I'm organizing the playbook structure with separate roles for each componentâprerequisites, K3s, Cilium, Tetragon, and Coderâalong with shared configuration files and variables. The key setup involves using local connection for localhost, disabling K3s's default networking components, and installing Cilium and Tetragon via Helm with kube-proxy replacement mode enabled. Before I start writing the actual tasks, I need to verify what tools are already available in the environment.",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "text": "I should gather the specific Helm values for Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder from documentation, and also account for WSL2-specific requirements like ensuring systemd is enabled, cgroups v2 is available, and kernel modules are loaded. The playbook needs to handle prerequisites like IP forwarding and dependencies, then install K3s with the right flags to disable flannel, kube-proxy, network policies, and Traefik. After that, Cilium gets installed with kube-proxy replacement, followed by Tetragon for workspace security policies, and finally Coder with persistent storage configuration.",
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "text": "For the Ansible implementation, I'll use the &#96;kubernetes.core&#96; collection for Helm operations and manifest management, and I need to think through the K3s installation flags carefullyâparticularly &#96;--flannel-backend=none&#96;, &#96;--disable-kube-proxy&#96;, and the kubeconfig permissions. For Cilium on K3s, I need to set the service host and port since kube-proxy is disabled, and for a single-node setup, I should set operator replicas to 1. I also want to include Hubble for observability. For Tetragon, I'll need to define TracingPolicies that secure AI agent workspaces by restricting access to sensitive paths and monitoring process execution.",
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "text": "Let me start building out the actual configuration files and tasks now. I need to look up the latest versions for k3s, Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder, plus specific Cilium Helm configuration for k3s with kube-proxy replacement. Let me also figure out whether to use the &#96;kubernetes.core.helm&#96; Ansible module or shell commandsâthe module is cleaner for idempotency but requires extra dependencies, so I'll go with shell commands wrapped properly for reliability and easier debugging. I'll start writing the files systematically, looking up specific configs as I go. For the Kubernetes components running without root, I need to ensure the kubeconfig has proper permissions after k3s installation so Helm can access it as a regular user. I'll also set up the Helm repositories for Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder, then configure each component with sensible defaultsâCoder will use a built-in PostgreSQL and NodePort service for local access on WSL2, while Tetragon gets TracingPolicy manifests for process execution, network connections, and sensitive file monitoring. Let me start writing out all the files now.",
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "text": "Setting up configuration files...",
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "I need to finalize the versions and think through the Tetragon TracingPolicies for monitoring workspace activity. For process execution, network connections, and sensitive file access, I'll use kprobes targeting the coder namespace. The Coder workspace template will need to support Podman-in-pod, either through privileged containers or a rootless setup with proper capabilities, and I can register it with Coder after the initial deployment.",
            "lineNumber": 480
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2517211139202118

          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 1001
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1002
          },
          {
            "text": "## Key design decisions",
            "lineNumber": 1003
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1004
          },
          {
            "text": "- **K3s flags**: &#96;--flannel-backend=none --disable-network-policy --disable-kube-proxy&#96; â gives Cilium full control over networking",

          {
            "text": "- **Cilium**: Full kube-proxy replacement with eBPF, Hubble UI enabled for observability",

          {
            "text": "- **Coder**: NodePort on &#96;30080&#96;, Bitnami PostgreSQL for persistence, accessible at &#96;http://localhost:30080&#96;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2985
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 3054
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "First, open **http://localhost:30080** in your browser and create your admin account. Then log in from the CLI:",
            "lineNumber": 2986
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2987
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2988
          },
          {
            "text": "coder login http://localhost:30080",
            "lineNumber": 2989
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2990
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2991
          },
          {
            "text": "## Step 2: Push the template",
            "lineNumber": 2992
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2993
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2994
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run template-push",
            "lineNumber": 2995
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2996
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2997
          },
          {
            "text": "Or manually:",
            "lineNumber": 2998
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2999
          },
          {
            "text": "coder templates push podman-workspace --directory templates/podman-workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3000
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 3001
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3002
          },
          {
            "text": "## Step 3: Create a workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3003
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3004
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 3005
          },
          {
            "text": "coder create my-workspace --template podman-workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3006
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 3007
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3008
          },
          {
            "text": "## What the template does",
            "lineNumber": 3009
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3010
          },
          {
            "text": "The &#96;templates/podman-workspace/main.tf&#96; creates:",
            "lineNumber": 3011
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3012
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A privileged Kubernetes pod** based on &#96;quay.io/podman/stable&#96; (Fedora with Podman pre-installed)",
            "lineNumber": 3013
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Podman configured with overlay storage** via fuse-overlayfs â so you can build and run containers inside the workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3014
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A PersistentVolumeClaim** (&#96;/workspace&#96;) for persistent data across workspace restarts",
            "lineNumber": 3015
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A dedicated emptyDir** (&#96;/var/lib/containers&#96;) for Podman's container storage",
            "lineNumber": 3016
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Resource limits**: 500m-2 CPU, 1-4Gi RAM (configurable via template variables)",
            "lineNumber": 3017
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Coder agent** with VS Code and web terminal enabled",
            "lineNumber": 3018
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3019
          },
          {
            "text": "Since Tetragon is running with TracingPolicies scoped to the &#96;coder&#96; namespace, every process execution, network connection, and sensitive file access inside this workspace will be monitored at the kernel level â even though the pod runs privileged.",
            "lineNumber": 3020
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3021
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3022
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3023
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 3024
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3025
          },
          {
            "text": "basĂŠ sur une image avec la derniere version de python",
            "lineNumber": 3026
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3027
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3028
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3029
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 3030
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3031
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"read\" data-tool-name=\"read_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3032
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **read_file_v2** â˘ Read file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/templates/podman-workspace/main.tf&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3033
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3034
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3035
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3036
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3037
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3038
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3039
          },
          {
            "text": "I'll switch to a Ubuntu 24.04 base with Python 3.12+ and Podman installed via a custom Dockerfile, rather than the Fedora-based Podman image.",
            "lineNumber": 3040
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3041
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3042
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3043
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3044
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3045
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** â˘ Edit file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/templates/podman-workspace/build/Dockerfile&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3046
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3047
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3048
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3049
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3050
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3051
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3052
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3053
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3054
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.24507856369018555

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./roles/coder/tasks/main.yml",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 61
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 96
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- name: Install or upgrade Coder",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    helm upgrade --install coder coder-v2/coder",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    --version {{ coder_version }}",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    --namespace {{ coder_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "    -f /tmp/coder-values.yml",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    --wait --timeout 5m",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _coder_install",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: \"'STATUS: deployed' in _coder_install.stdout\"",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Wait for Coder deployment to be ready",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    kubectl rollout status deployment/coder",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    -n {{ coder_namespace }} --timeout=300s",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _coder_ready",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "  retries: 3",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "  delay: 10",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "  until: _coder_ready.rc == 0",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Verify Coder pods",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: kubectl -n {{ coder_namespace }} get pods -o wide",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _coder_pods",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Display Coder pod status",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.debug:",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    msg: \"{{ _coder_pods.stdout_lines }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Display access information",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.debug:",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    msg:",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"Coder is available at: {{ coder_access_url }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"Create your first admin user by visiting the URL above.\"",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"To create workspaces with Podman, use a Kubernetes template with privileged securityContext.\"",
            "lineNumber": 96
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2449900507926941

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 33
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "This is a solid architecture choice for securing agentic AI dev environments. Let me give you my analysis of the stack and the key considerations before we start implementing.",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "## Overall Assessment: Strong Stack, Some WSL2 Caveats",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "Your stack: **K3s + Cilium + Tetragon + Coder + Podman** is well-aligned for the goal of secure agentic AI workspaces. Here's my breakdown:",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "### What works well",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "**Cilium as CNI** â Replacing k3s's default Flannel with Cilium gives you eBPF-based network policies, which are far more powerful than standard Kubernetes NetworkPolicies. You can enforce L7 policies (HTTP, DNS) to control exactly what an AI agent's workspace can reach. Your WSL2 kernel (&#96;6.6.87&#96;) has excellent eBPF support, so Cilium will work well.",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "**Tetragon for runtime security** â This is the killer feature for agentic AI. Tetragon lets you:",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "- Monitor and enforce which processes can run inside Coder workspaces (block unexpected binaries)",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "- Track file access patterns (detect if an agent tries to read sensitive files)",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "- Observe network connections at the syscall level (catch data exfiltration attempts)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "- Write TracingPolicy CRDs to enforce rules at the kernel level, not just at the container boundary",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "This is exactly what you need when AI agents are executing arbitrary code in your workspaces.",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "**Coder workspaces on K8s** â Coder's Kubernetes provisioner gives you proper isolation per workspace, resource limits, and lifecycle management. Each AI agent gets its own pod with its own security boundary.",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "### Key challenges and trade-offs",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Podman-in-Pod tension with security** â Running Podman inside Coder workspaces requires either privileged pods or user namespace mapping. This directly conflicts with the \"secure everything\" goal of Cilium/Tetragon. You'll need to carefully configure:",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "   - &#96;securityContext&#96; with user namespaces (Kubernetes 1.28+ feature)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.23300600051879883
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2349
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2412
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "System looks good overall:",
            "lineNumber": 2350
          },
          {
            "text": "- systemd: \"degraded\" (common on WSL2, some units fail - usually fine for k3s)",
            "lineNumber": 2351
          },
          {
            "text": "- Docker: some stopped containers (leftover from other projects) - shouldn't conflict",
            "lineNumber": 2352
          },
          {
            "text": "- k3s: not installed yet - good",
            "lineNumber": 2353
          },
          {
            "text": "- Ansible: working (2.20.3)",
            "lineNumber": 2354
          },
          {
            "text": "- Kernel: 6.6.87 - good for eBPF/Cilium",
            "lineNumber": 2355
          },
          {
            "text": "- Memory: 31Gi total, 29Gi available - plenty",
            "lineNumber": 2356
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2357
          },
          {
            "text": "The user needs to:",
            "lineNumber": 2358
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Install Ansible Galaxy collections",
            "lineNumber": 2359
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Run the playbook",
            "lineNumber": 2360
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2361
          },
          {
            "text": "Let me also check if the Ansible collections are installed already.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2362
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2363
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2364
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2365
          },
          {
            "text": "Your system is ready. 31GB RAM, kernel 6.6.87 (great eBPF support), systemd running, no k3s yet. Here's what you need to do:",
            "lineNumber": 2366
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2367
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2368
          },
          {
            "text": "# 1. Install the required Ansible collections (one-time)",
            "lineNumber": 2369
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run init",
            "lineNumber": 2370
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2371
          },
          {
            "text": "# 2. Deploy the full stack",
            "lineNumber": 2372
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run deploy",
            "lineNumber": 2373
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2374
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2375
          },
          {
            "text": "That's it. &#96;mise run deploy&#96; depends on &#96;init&#96; so it will install collections first automatically, then run the playbook which does:",
            "lineNumber": 2376
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2377
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **prereq** â sysctl tuning, kernel modules, install Helm",
            "lineNumber": 2378
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **k3s** â install k3s with Cilium-ready flags (no flannel, no kube-proxy)",
            "lineNumber": 2379
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **cilium** â install Cilium CNI via Helm, wait for node Ready",
            "lineNumber": 2380
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **tetragon** â install Tetragon + deploy 3 TracingPolicies for workspace security",
            "lineNumber": 2381
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **coder** â install PostgreSQL + Coder via Helm on NodePort 30080",
            "lineNumber": 2382
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2383
          },
          {
            "text": "It will prompt for your sudo password (&#96;--ask-become-pass&#96;) since k3s installation needs root.",
            "lineNumber": 2384
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2385
          },
          {
            "text": "One note: systemd shows \"degraded\" which is normal on WSL2 (a few default units always fail). K3s handles this fine.",
            "lineNumber": 2386
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2387
          },
          {
            "text": "Want me to kick it off?",
            "lineNumber": 2388
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2389
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2390
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2391
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 2392
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2393
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2396
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2397
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 2398
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2399
          },
          {
            "text": "The &#96;community.general.yaml&#96; callback plugin was removed in newer versions. The &#96;ansible.cfg&#96; references it via &#96;stdout_callback = yaml&#96;. Let me fix it.",
            "lineNumber": 2400
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32

          {

            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "RUN ln -sf /usr/bin/python3 /usr/bin/python",

          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
