          {
            "text": "#!/bin/bash",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "set -e",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "TARGET_USER=\"${CODER_USERNAME:-coder}\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "TARGET_HOME=\"/home/$TARGET_USER\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "if [ \"$TARGET_USER\" != \"coder\" ] &amp;&amp; id coder &amp;&gt;/dev/null; then",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  usermod -l \"$TARGET_USER\" coder",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  groupmod -n \"$TARGET_USER\" coder",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  usermod -d \"$TARGET_HOME\" \"$TARGET_USER\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  # Seed PVC with skeleton home content on first run",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  if [ -d \"/home/coder\" ] &amp;&amp; [ ! -f \"$TARGET_HOME/.bashrc\" ]; then",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    cp -a /home/coder/. \"$TARGET_HOME/\" 2&gt;/dev/null || true",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  fi",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  rm -rf /home/coder",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  chown -R \"$TARGET_USER\":\"$TARGET_USER\" \"$TARGET_HOME\"",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  if [ -f /etc/sudoers.d/coder ]; then",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    sed -i \"s/coder/$TARGET_USER/g\" /etc/sudoers.d/coder",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    mv /etc/sudoers.d/coder \"/etc/sudoers.d/$TARGET_USER\" 2&gt;/dev/null || true",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  fi",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "else",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  # Ensure home ownership even when username is already \"coder\"",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  chown -R coder:coder \"$TARGET_HOME\" 2&gt;/dev/null || true",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "fi",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "exec runuser -l \"$TARGET_USER\" -- \"$@\"",
            "lineNumber": 29
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2469
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2537
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "To filter by Kubernetes namespace, I need to use &#96;matchNamespaceChanges&#96; or the &#96;namespaceSelector&#96; field, or use pod labels with &#96;matchPodLabels&#96;. Let me check the Tetragon docs for the correct way to filter by Kubernetes namespace.",
            "lineNumber": 2471
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2472
          },
          {
            "text": "Actually, looking at the Tetragon API:",
            "lineNumber": 2473
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2474
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2475
          },
          {
            "text": "The right approach is to use &#96;TracingPolicyNamespaced&#96; instead of the cluster-scoped &#96;TracingPolicy&#96; resource, then deploy it directly in the target namespace. Let me update all three policy files to use this namespace-scoped CRD and place them in the &#96;coder&#96; namespace.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2477
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2479
          },
          {
            "text": "The error is that &#96;matchNamespaces&#96; in Tetragon refers to **Linux kernel namespaces** (Pid, Net, Mnt, etc.), not Kubernetes namespaces. To scope policies to the &#96;coder&#96; K8s namespace, I need to use &#96;TracingPolicyNamespaced&#96; instead. Let me fix all three policies.",
            "lineNumber": 2480
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2481
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2482
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2483
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2485
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** â˘ Edit file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/policy-exec-monitor.yml&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2487
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2488
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2489
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2490
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2491
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2492
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2493
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2494
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2495
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** â˘ Edit file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/policy-network-monitor.yml&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2496
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2497
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2498
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2499
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2500
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2501
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2502
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2503
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2504
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2505
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** â˘ Edit file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/policy-sensitive-access.yml&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2506
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2507
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2508
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2509
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2510
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2511
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2512
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2513
          },
          {
            "text": "Now update the task to apply them in the &#96;coder&#96; namespace (since &#96;TracingPolicyNamespaced&#96; is namespace-scoped).",
            "lineNumber": 2514
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2515
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2516
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2517
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"read\" data-tool-name=\"read_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2518
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **read_file_v2** â˘ Read file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/tasks/main.yml&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2519
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2520
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2521
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2522
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2523
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2524
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2525
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2526
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2527
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** â˘ Edit file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/tasks/main.yml&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2528
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2529
          },

            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2530
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 2532
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2533
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2534
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2535
          },
          {
            "text": "Fixed. The three changes:",
            "lineNumber": 2536
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./roles/tetragon/tasks/main.yml",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

            "line": 54,

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Add Cilium Helm repository (for Tetragon)",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: helm repo add cilium https://helm.cilium.io/",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _tetragon_repo",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: \"'has been added' in _tetragon_repo.stdout\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  failed_when: _tetragon_repo.rc != 0 and 'already exists' not in _tetragon_repo.stderr",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Update Cilium Helm repository",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: helm repo update cilium",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Template Tetragon Helm values",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.template:",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    src: values.yml.j2",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    dest: /tmp/tetragon-values.yml",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    mode: \"0644\"",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Install or upgrade Tetragon",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    helm upgrade --install tetragon cilium/tetragon",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    --version {{ tetragon_version }}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    --namespace kube-system",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    -f /tmp/tetragon-values.yml",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    --wait --timeout 5m",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _tetragon_install",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: \"'STATUS: deployed' in _tetragon_install.stdout\"",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Wait for Tetragon daemonset to be ready",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    kubectl rollout status daemonset/tetragon",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    -n kube-system --timeout=300s",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _tetragon_ready",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "  retries: 3",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  delay: 10",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  until: _tetragon_ready.rc == 0",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Ensure workspace namespace exists for TracingPolicies",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.command: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    kubectl create namespace {{ tetragon_workspace_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    --dry-run=client -o yaml",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _ns_manifest",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: false",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Apply workspace namespace",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  ansible.builtin.shell: &gt;-",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    kubectl create namespace {{ tetragon_workspace_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  register: _ns_apply",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  changed_when: \"'created' in _ns_apply.stdout\"",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Deploy TracingPolicies for workspace security",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  when: tetragon_deploy_policies",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  block:",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 55
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3083227872848511

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8619
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8621
          },
          {
            "text": "---",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8623
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"shell\" data-tool-name=\"run_terminal_command_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 8624
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** â˘ Run command: cat &gt; /tmp/coder-values.yml &lt;&lt; 'EOF'",
            "lineNumber": 8625
          },
          {
            "text": "coder:",
            "lineNumber": 8626
          },
          {
            "text": "  env:",
            "lineNumber": 8627
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8628
          },
          {
            "text": "      value: \"postgres://coder:coder-dev-password@coder-db-postgresql.coder.svc.cluster.local:5432/coder?sslmode=disable\"",
            "lineNumber": 8629
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: CODER_ACCESS_URL",
            "lineNumber": 8630
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8631
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8632
          },
          {
            "text": "      value: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 8633
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8634
          },
          {
            "text": "  service:",
            "lineNumber": 8635
          },
          {
            "text": "    type: NodePort",
            "lineNumber": 8636
          },
          {
            "text": "    httpNodePort: 30080",
            "lineNumber": 8637
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8638
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8639
          },
          {
            "text": "    requests:",
            "lineNumber": 8640
          },
          {
            "text": "      memory: 256Mi",
            "lineNumber": 8641
          },
          {
            "text": "      cpu: 100m",
            "lineNumber": 8642
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8643
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8644
          },
          {
            "text": "EOF",
            "lineNumber": 8645
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8646
          },
          {
            "text": "helm upgrade coder coder-v2/coder --version 2.30.2 --namespace coder -f /tmp/coder-values.yml --wait --timeout 3m 2&gt;&amp;1&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 8647
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8648
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8649
          },
          {
            "text": "cat &gt; /tmp/coder-values.yml &lt;&lt; 'EOF'",
            "lineNumber": 8650
          },
          {
            "text": "coder:",
            "lineNumber": 8651
          },
          {
            "text": "  env:",
            "lineNumber": 8652
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8653

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8655
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  resources:",
            "lineNumber": 8664
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8665

          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 8670
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8671
          },
          {
            "text": "helm upgrade coder coder-v2/coder --version 2.30.2 --namespace coder -f /tmp/coder-values.yml --wait --timeout 3m 2&gt;&amp;1",
            "lineNumber": 8672
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 8673
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8674
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 8675
          },
          {
            "text": "Release \"coder\" has been upgraded. Happy Helming!",
            "lineNumber": 8676
          },
          {
            "text": "NAME: coder",
            "lineNumber": 8677
          },
          {
            "text": "LAST DEPLOYED: Fri Feb 27 02:09:20 2026",
            "lineNumber": 8678
          },
          {
            "text": "NAMESPACE: coder",
            "lineNumber": 8679
          },
          {
            "text": "STATUS: deployed",
            "lineNumber": 8680
          },
          {
            "text": "REVISION: 4",
            "lineNumber": 8681
          },
          {
            "text": "TEST SUITE: None",
            "lineNumber": 8682
          },
          {
            "text": "NOTES:",
            "lineNumber": 8683
          },
          {
            "text": "Enjoy Coder! Please create an issue at https://github.com/coder/coder if you run",
            "lineNumber": 8684
          },
          {
            "text": "into any problems! :)",
            "lineNumber": 8685
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8686
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 8687
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 8688
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 8689
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8690
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 8691
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8692
          },
          {
            "text": "Now the agent will download from &#96;http://172.26.122.221:30080&#96; instead of &#96;localhost&#96;. The running workspace needs a restart for the new init script. You can do this from the Coder UI at &#96;http://172.26.122.221:30080&#96; (or &#96;http://localhost:30080&#96; â both work from your browser), or:",
            "lineNumber": 8693
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8694
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 8695
          },
          {
            "text": "coder restart ws --yes",
            "lineNumber": 8696
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 8697
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8698
          },
          {
            "text": "**Note**: The WSL2 IP (&#96;172.26.122.221&#96;) can change on reboot. If it does, you'll need to re-run the Helm upgrade with the new IP. For a more permanent solution, you could use &#96;$(hostname -I | awk '{print $1}')&#96; in the Ansible playbook to auto-detect it.",
            "lineNumber": 8699
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3048593997955322
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2985
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 3054
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "First, open **http://localhost:30080** in your browser and create your admin account. Then log in from the CLI:",
            "lineNumber": 2986
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2987
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2988
          },
          {
            "text": "coder login http://localhost:30080",
            "lineNumber": 2989
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2990
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2991
          },
          {
            "text": "## Step 2: Push the template",
            "lineNumber": 2992
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2993
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2994
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run template-push",
            "lineNumber": 2995
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2996
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2997
          },
          {
            "text": "Or manually:",
            "lineNumber": 2998
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2999
          },
          {
            "text": "coder templates push podman-workspace --directory templates/podman-workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3000
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 3001
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3002
          },
          {
            "text": "## Step 3: Create a workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3003
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3004
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 3005
          },
          {
            "text": "coder create my-workspace --template podman-workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3006
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 3007
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3008
          },
          {
            "text": "## What the template does",
            "lineNumber": 3009
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3010
          },
          {
            "text": "The &#96;templates/podman-workspace/main.tf&#96; creates:",
            "lineNumber": 3011
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3012
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A privileged Kubernetes pod** based on &#96;quay.io/podman/stable&#96; (Fedora with Podman pre-installed)",
            "lineNumber": 3013
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Podman configured with overlay storage** via fuse-overlayfs â so you can build and run containers inside the workspace",
            "lineNumber": 3014
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A PersistentVolumeClaim** (&#96;/workspace&#96;) for persistent data across workspace restarts",
            "lineNumber": 3015
          },
          {
            "text": "- **A dedicated emptyDir** (&#96;/var/lib/containers&#96;) for Podman's container storage",
            "lineNumber": 3016
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Resource limits**: 500m-2 CPU, 1-4Gi RAM (configurable via template variables)",
            "lineNumber": 3017
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Coder agent** with VS Code and web terminal enabled",
            "lineNumber": 3018
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3019
          },
          {
            "text": "Since Tetragon is running with TracingPolicies scoped to the &#96;coder&#96; namespace, every process execution, network connection, and sensitive file access inside this workspace will be monitored at the kernel level â even though the pod runs privileged.",
            "lineNumber": 3020
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3021
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3022
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3023
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 3024
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3025
          },
          {
            "text": "basĂŠ sur une image avec la derniere version de python",
            "lineNumber": 3026
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3027
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3028
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3029
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 3030
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3031
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"read\" data-tool-name=\"read_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3032
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **read_file_v2** â˘ Read file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/templates/podman-workspace/main.tf&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3033
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3034
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3035
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3036
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3037
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3038
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3039
          },
          {
            "text": "I'll switch to a Ubuntu 24.04 base with Python 3.12+ and Podman installed via a custom Dockerfile, rather than the Fedora-based Podman image.",
            "lineNumber": 3040
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3041
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3042
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3043
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3044
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3045
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **edit_file_v2** â˘ Edit file: /home/jeremie/projects/infra/templates/podman-workspace/build/Dockerfile&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3046
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3047
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/details&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3048
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3049
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/tool-use&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3050
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3051
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 3052
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3053
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"write\" data-tool-name=\"edit_file_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 3054
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3039954900741577
    },

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Tear down the entire stack",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "  hosts: localhost",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  become: false",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  gather_facts: false",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  environment:",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "    KUBECONFIG: \"{{ kubeconfig_path }}\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  tasks:",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove Coder",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall coder -n {{ coder_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove PostgreSQL",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall coder-db -n {{ coder_namespace }}",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove TracingPolicies",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: \"kubectl delete -f /tmp/{{ item }} --ignore-not-found\"",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "      loop:",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        - policy-exec-monitor.yml",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "        - policy-network-monitor.yml",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "        - policy-sensitive-access.yml",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove Tetragon",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall tetragon -n kube-system",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove Cilium",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: helm uninstall cilium -n kube-system",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Delete Coder namespace",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: kubectl delete namespace {{ coder_namespace }} --ignore-not-found",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "      ignore_errors: true",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- name: Uninstall K3s",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  hosts: localhost",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  become: true",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  gather_facts: false",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  tasks:",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Check if k3s-uninstall script exists",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.stat:",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        path: /usr/local/bin/k3s-uninstall.sh",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      register: _k3s_uninstall",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Run k3s uninstall script",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      when: _k3s_uninstall.stat.exists",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.command: /usr/local/bin/k3s-uninstall.sh",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      changed_when: true",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: Remove kubeconfig",

          },
          {
            "text": "      ansible.builtin.file:",

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2684
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 2744
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **cilium-envoy** â L7 proxy for HTTP-aware network policies",
            "lineNumber": 2685
          },
          {
            "text": "- **hubble-relay + hubble-ui** â network observability dashboard (see all traffic flows between pods)",
            "lineNumber": 2686
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2687
          },
          {
            "text": "### Layer 3: Tetragon (Runtime Security)",
            "lineNumber": 2688
          },
          {
            "text": "- **tetragon** DaemonSet â eBPF-based runtime security engine, monitors all syscalls at kernel level",
            "lineNumber": 2689
          },
          {
            "text": "- **tetragon-operator** â manages TracingPolicy CRDs",
            "lineNumber": 2690
          },
          {
            "text": "- **3 TracingPolicies** scoped to the &#96;coder&#96; namespace:",
            "lineNumber": 2691
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;workspace-exec-monitor&#96; â logs every process execution (execve) in Coder workspaces",
            "lineNumber": 2692
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;workspace-network-monitor&#96; â logs every TCP connect/close in Coder workspaces",
            "lineNumber": 2693
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;workspace-sensitive-access&#96; â logs access to sensitive files (/etc/shadow, K8s secrets, rancher config)",
            "lineNumber": 2694
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2695
          },
          {
            "text": "### Layer 4: Coder (Dev Workspaces)",
            "lineNumber": 2696
          },
          {
            "text": "- **coder** â the workspace platform, exposed on **NodePort 30080**",
            "lineNumber": 2697
          },
          {
            "text": "- **coder-db-postgresql** â dedicated PostgreSQL 18 for Coder persistence",
            "lineNumber": 2698
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2699
          },
          {
            "text": "## How to explore",
            "lineNumber": 2700
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2701
          },
          {
            "text": "**Coder UI** â open in your browser:",
            "lineNumber": 2702
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2703
          },
          {
            "text": "http://localhost:30080",
            "lineNumber": 2704
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2705
          },
          {
            "text": "Create your first admin account there.",
            "lineNumber": 2706
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2707
          },
          {
            "text": "**k9s** â terminal UI for your cluster:",
            "lineNumber": 2708
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2709
          },
          {
            "text": "k9s",
            "lineNumber": 2710
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2711
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2712
          },
          {
            "text": "**Hubble UI** â visualize network flows (port-forward to access):",
            "lineNumber": 2713
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2714
          },
          {
            "text": "kubectl port-forward -n kube-system svc/hubble-ui 12000:80",
            "lineNumber": 2715
          },
          {
            "text": "# then open http://localhost:12000",
            "lineNumber": 2716
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2717
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2718
          },
          {
            "text": "**Tetragon security events** â watch AI agent activity in real-time:",
            "lineNumber": 2719
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2720
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run tetragon-logs",
            "lineNumber": 2721
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2722
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2723
          },
          {
            "text": "**Quick cluster health**:",
            "lineNumber": 2724
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 2725
          },
          {
            "text": "mise run status",
            "lineNumber": 2726
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 2727
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2728
          },
          {
            "text": "Everything is managed as code in your Ansible playbook. If you ever need to rebuild, &#96;mise run reset&#96; tears it all down and &#96;mise run deploy&#96; brings it back up identically.",
            "lineNumber": 2729
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2730
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2731
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2732
          },
          {
            "text": "_**User**_",
            "lineNumber": 2733
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2734
          },
          {
            "text": "il me faut maintenant probablement un premier template coder qui me permette de faire du podman",
            "lineNumber": 2735
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2736
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 2737
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2738
          },
          {
            "text": "_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_",
            "lineNumber": 2739
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2740
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;think&gt;&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Thought Process&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 2741
          },
          {
            "text": "The user wants a Coder template that allows them to use Podman for container-in-container workflows in their Coder workspaces. This is for their agentic AI dev environments.",
            "lineNumber": 2742
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2743
          },
          {
            "text": "Coder templates are Terraform files. I need to create a Coder template that:",
            "lineNumber": 2744
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29798316955566406
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 7704
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 7757
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Delete all workspaces (orphan to skip terraform)",
            "lineNumber": 7705
          },
          {
            "text": "curl -s -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/workspaces\" | jq -r '.workspaces[].id' | while read id; do",
            "lineNumber": 7706
          },
          {
            "text": "  echo \"Deleting $id...\"",
            "lineNumber": 7707
          },
          {
            "text": "  curl -s -X DELETE -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/workspaces/$id?orphan=true\" 2&gt;&amp;1",
            "lineNumber": 7708
          },
          {
            "text": "done",
            "lineNumber": 7709
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7710
          },
          {
            "text": "# Clean all workspace k8s resources",
            "lineNumber": 7711
          },
          {
            "text": "kubectl delete pvc -n coder -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coder-workspace 2&gt;&amp;1 || true",
            "lineNumber": 7712
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7713
          },
          {
            "text": "echo \"Waiting 30s for cleanup...\"",
            "lineNumber": 7714
          },
          {
            "text": "sleep 30",
            "lineNumber": 7715
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7716
          },
          {
            "text": "# Check workspace count",
            "lineNumber": 7717
          },
          {
            "text": "COUNT=$(curl -s -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/workspaces\" | jq '.count')",
            "lineNumber": 7718
          },
          {
            "text": "echo \"Workspaces: $COUNT\"",
            "lineNumber": 7719
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7720
          },
          {
            "text": "# Create brand new workspace",
            "lineNumber": 7721
          },
          {
            "text": "if [ \"$COUNT\" = \"0\" ]; then",
            "lineNumber": 7722
          },
          {
            "text": "  TEMPLATE_VERSION=$(curl -s -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/organizations/default/templates/podman-workspace\" | jq -r '.active_version_id')",
            "lineNumber": 7723
          },
          {
            "text": "  curl -s -X POST -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\",
            "lineNumber": 7724
          },
          {
            "text": "    -d \"{\\\"name\\\":\\\"ws\\\",\\\"template_version_id\\\":\\\"$TEMPLATE_VERSION\\\"}\" \\",
            "lineNumber": 7725
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/organizations/default/members/me/workspaces\" | jq '{name: .name, status: .latest_build.status}'",
            "lineNumber": 7726
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7727
          },
          {
            "text": "  echo \"Waiting for workspace...\"",
            "lineNumber": 7728
          },
          {
            "text": "  for i in $(seq 1 30); do",
            "lineNumber": 7729
          },
          {
            "text": "    sleep 5",
            "lineNumber": 7730
          },
          {
            "text": "    S=$(curl -s -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/users/me/workspace/ws\" | jq -r '.latest_build.status')",
            "lineNumber": 7731
          },
          {
            "text": "    echo \"  $S\"",
            "lineNumber": 7732
          },
          {
            "text": "    [ \"$S\" = \"running\" ] || [ \"$S\" = \"failed\" ] &amp;&amp; break",
            "lineNumber": 7733
          },
          {
            "text": "  done",
            "lineNumber": 7734
          },
          {
            "text": "fi&lt;/summary&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 7735
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7736
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 7737
          },
          {
            "text": "CODER_URL=\"http://localhost:30080\"",
            "lineNumber": 7738
          },
          {
            "text": "TOKEN=$(cat ~/.config/coderv2/session 2&gt;/dev/null)",
            "lineNumber": 7739
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7740
          },
          {
            "text": "# Delete all workspaces (orphan to skip terraform)",
            "lineNumber": 7741
          },
          {
            "text": "curl -s -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/workspaces\" | jq -r '.workspaces[].id' | while read id; do",
            "lineNumber": 7742
          },
          {
            "text": "  echo \"Deleting $id...\"",
            "lineNumber": 7743
          },
          {
            "text": "  curl -s -X DELETE -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/workspaces/$id?orphan=true\" 2&gt;&amp;1",
            "lineNumber": 7744
          },
          {
            "text": "done",
            "lineNumber": 7745
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7746
          },
          {
            "text": "# Clean all workspace k8s resources",
            "lineNumber": 7747
          },
          {
            "text": "kubectl delete pvc -n coder -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coder-workspace 2&gt;&amp;1 || true",
            "lineNumber": 7748
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7749
          },
          {
            "text": "echo \"Waiting 30s for cleanup...\"",
            "lineNumber": 7750
          },
          {
            "text": "sleep 30",
            "lineNumber": 7751
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7752
          },
          {
            "text": "# Check workspace count",
            "lineNumber": 7753
          },
          {
            "text": "COUNT=$(curl -s -H \"Coder-Session-Token: $TOKEN\" \"$CODER_URL/api/v2/workspaces\" | jq '.count')",
            "lineNumber": 7754
          },
          {
            "text": "echo \"Workspaces: $COUNT\"",
            "lineNumber": 7755
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7756
          },
          {
            "text": "# Create brand new workspace",
            "lineNumber": 7757
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 474
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 488
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "Let me start building out the actual configuration files and tasks now. I need to look up the latest versions for k3s, Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder, plus specific Cilium Helm configuration for k3s with kube-proxy replacement. Let me also figure out whether to use the &#96;kubernetes.core.helm&#96; Ansible module or shell commandsâthe module is cleaner for idempotency but requires extra dependencies, so I'll go with shell commands wrapped properly for reliability and easier debugging. I'll start writing the files systematically, looking up specific configs as I go. For the Kubernetes components running without root, I need to ensure the kubeconfig has proper permissions after k3s installation so Helm can access it as a regular user. I'll also set up the Helm repositories for Cilium, Tetragon, and Coder, then configure each component with sensible defaultsâCoder will use a built-in PostgreSQL and NodePort service for local access on WSL2, while Tetragon gets TracingPolicy manifests for process execution, network connections, and sensitive file monitoring. Let me start writing out all the files now.",
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "text": "Setting up configuration files...",
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "I need to finalize the versions and think through the Tetragon TracingPolicies for monitoring workspace activity. For process execution, network connections, and sensitive file access, I'll use kprobes targeting the coder namespace. The Coder workspace template will need to support Podman-in-pod, either through privileged containers or a rootless setup with proper capabilities, and I can register it with Coder after the initial deployment.",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "text": "Now I'm mapping out all the files I need to create: the Ansible configuration, requirements, inventory, group variables, main playbook, and then five roles (prereq, k3s, cilium, tetragon, coder) with their tasks, defaults, handlers, and policy files. I'll use &#96;lookup('env', 'HOME')&#96; in group_vars to handle the kubeconfig path consistently across plays with different privilege levels.",
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "Generating Ansible configuration files... I'm realizing that &#96;ansible_env&#96; reflects the become_user's environment when &#96;become: true&#96; is set, so I need to be careful about how I reference paths. The safest approach is to define the target user and home directory as variables in group_vars using &#96;lookup('env', ...)&#96;, which always reads from the controller's environment rather than the remote or become user. Now I'll write out all the configuration files, starting with the prereq role tasks.",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "Writing prereq tasks...",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "Writing k3s role configuration... I'm setting up the Cilium installation tasksâfirst checking if it's already deployed, then installing it with the appropriate Helm values if needed, or upgrading it if the version has changed.",
            "lineNumber": 488
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.28723448514938354
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-26_22-37Z-k3s-setup-for-secure-coder-workspaces.md",

            "line": 4320
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "The values file is a Jinja2 template, not raw YAML â Helm can't parse it directly. I need to render it first. Let me render it manually.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 4245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4246
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 4247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4248
          },
          {
            "text": "The values file is a Jinja2 template â Helm can't parse it directly. Let me render it first and then run the upgrade.",
            "lineNumber": 4249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4250
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 4251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4252
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;tool-use data-tool-type=\"shell\" data-tool-name=\"run_terminal_command_v2\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 4253
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;details&gt;&lt;summary&gt;Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** â˘ Run command: cat &gt; /tmp/coder-values.yml &lt;&lt; 'EOF'",
            "lineNumber": 4254
          },
          {
            "text": "coder:",
            "lineNumber": 4255
          },
          {
            "text": "  env:",
            "lineNumber": 4256
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: CODER_PG_CONNECTION_URL",
            "lineNumber": 4257
          },
          {
            "text": "      value: \"postgres://coder:coder-dev-password@coder-db-postgresql.coder.svc.cluster.local:5432/coder?sslmode=disable\"",
            "lineNumber": 4258
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: CODER_ACCESS_URL",
            "lineNumber": 4259
          },
          {
            "text": "      value: \"http://localhost:30080\"",
            "lineNumber": 4260
          },
          {
            "text": "    - name: CODER_WILDCARD_ACCESS_URL",
            "lineNumber": 4261
          },
          {
            "text": "      value: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4262
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4263
          },
          {
            "text": "  service:",
            "lineNumber": 4264
          },
          {
            "text": "    type: NodePort",
            "lineNumber": 4265
          },
          {
            "text": "    httpNodePort: 30080",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4267
          },
          {
            "text": "  resources:",

          },
          {
            "text": "    requests:",

          {

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 4273
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 4276
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",

          },

            "text": "cat &gt; /tmp/coder-values.yml &lt;&lt; 'EOF'",

          {

            "lineNumber": 4279
          },
          {

## Tetragon Configuration Summary

### 1. Tetragon Version
- Version: `1.4.0` (configured in `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/defaults/main.yml` and `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/group_vars/all.yml`)
- Installed via Helm chart from `cilium/tetragon` repository
- Deployed in `kube-system` namespace

### 2. Tetragon Policies

Three `TracingPolicyNamespaced` policies are deployed in the `coder` namespace:

#### Policy 1: `workspace-exec-monitor`
**File:** `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/policy-exec-monitor.yml`
```yaml
apiVersion: cilium.io/v1alpha1
kind: TracingPolicyNamespaced
metadata:
  name: workspace-exec-monitor
spec:
  kprobes:
    - call: "sys_execve"
      syscall: true
      args:
        - index: 0
          type: "string"
```
Monitors process execution via `sys_execve`.

#### Policy 2: `workspace-network-monitor`
**File:** `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/policy-network-monitor.yml`
```yaml
apiVersion: cilium.io/v1alpha1
kind: TracingPolicyNamespaced
metadata:
  name: workspace-network-monitor
spec:
  kprobes:
    - call: "tcp_connect"
      syscall: false
      args:
        - index: 0
          type: "sock"
    - call: "tcp_close"
      syscall: false
      args:
        - index: 0
          type: "sock"
```
Monitors TCP connections and disconnections.

#### Policy 3: `workspace-sensitive-access`
**File:** `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/policy-sensitive-access.yml`
```yaml
apiVersion: cilium.io/v1alpha1
kind: TracingPolicyNamespaced
metadata:
  name: workspace-sensitive-access
spec:
  kprobes:
    - call: "security_file_open"
      syscall: false
      args:
        - index: 0
          type: "file"
      selectors:
        - matchArgs:
            - index: 0
              operator: "Prefix"
              values:
                - "/etc/shadow"
                - "/etc/gshadow"
                - "/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io"
                - "/var/lib/rancher"
                - "/etc/rancher"
                - "/root/.kube"
```
Monitors access to sensitive files/paths (shadow files, Kubernetes secrets, Rancher configs, kubeconfig).

### 3. How Policies Are Applied

**Deployment Method:**
- Policies are applied via Ansible role `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/tasks/main.yml`
- Type: `TracingPolicyNamespaced` (namespace-scoped)
- Target namespace: `coder` (configured via `tetragon_workspace_namespace: coder`)
- Applied conditionally when `tetragon_deploy_policies: true` (default: `true`)

**Deployment Flow:**
1. Tetragon Helm chart installed in `kube-system`
2. `coder` namespace created if it doesn't exist
3. Three policy files copied to `/tmp/`
4. Policies applied to `coder` namespace via `kubectl apply -n coder`

### 4. Coder Workspace Namespace Configuration

**Namespace:** `coder` (default in both Tetragon config and Coder template)

**Workspace Pod Configuration** (`/home/jeremie/projects/infra/templates/podman-workspace/main.tf`):
- Namespace: `coder` (variable, default: `"coder"`)
- Security Context: `privileged: true` (required for Podman-in-pod)
- Labels:
  - `app.kubernetes.io/name: coder-workspace`
  - `app.kubernetes.io/part-of: coder`
  - `coder.workspace.id: <workspace-id>`
  - `coder.workspace.owner: <owner-name>`
- Resources:
  - CPU: 500m request, 2 limit (default)
  - Memory: 1Gi request, 4Gi limit (default)
  - Storage: 10Gi PVC (default)

**Tetragon Configuration** (`/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/templates/values.yml.j2`):
```yaml
tetragon:
  enableProcessCred: true
  enableProcessNs: true
  exportAllowList: '{"event_set":["PROCESS_EXEC","PROCESS_EXIT","PROCESS_KPROBE"]}'
```

### Key Points

1. Policies are namespace-scoped (`TracingPolicyNamespaced`) and only monitor pods in the `coder` namespace
2. Workspace pods run with `privileged: true` for Podman; Tetragon still monitors at the kernel level
3. Events exported: `PROCESS_EXEC`, `PROCESS_EXIT`, `PROCESS_KPROBE`
4. Policies monitor: process execution, network connections, and sensitive file access

All policy files are in `/home/jeremie/projects/infra/roles/tetragon/files/` and are deployed automatically when the Tetragon Ansible role runs.
